blockingIssues.description: CatalogService.bulkUpsertProducts swallows bean-validation failures per item and degrades them into generic FAILED row results, leaving per-item validation behavior incorrect.
FinishedGoods decomposition is not real: business logic remains concentrated in FinishedGoodsWorkflowService (~2119 lines) while focused services are pass-through delegators.
Raw-material batch flows do not reliably capture manufacturing/expiry metadata across purchase/intake/opening-stock paths, so full batch traceability requirements are not met.
Frontend handoff documentation contains incorrect dispatch reservation semantics and an unreachable production lifecycle transition, creating blocking API behavior drift for frontend consumers.

appliedUpdates.description: Added commands.init entry pointing to /home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control/.factory/init.sh to standardize reproducible worker setup.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify .factory edit boundaries by explicitly distinguishing mission infrastructure (protected) from allowed worker outputs/knowledge locations (.factory/validation, .factory/library, .factory/services.yaml).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple reviews flagged conflicting guidance: mission AGENTS disallows .factory edits while worker skill/procedure requires frontend handoff and scrutiny artifacts under .factory.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update backend-worker skill with an explicit documentation-validation checklist for doc-only features (controller path verification, state-machine transition proof, auth constraints, feature-flag/profile gating).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: catalog-inventory-frontend-handoff-doc review found two blocking factual drifts that compile/tests did not catch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow and document a decomposition-specific workflow variant: refactor-first with mandatory targeted+regression tests when work is behavior-preserving structural decomposition.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: decompose-finished-goods-service handoff reported process deviation from strict TDD ordering despite running regression verification.

rejectedObservations.observation: Mission guidance and skill conflict on .factory edits
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate: reported by multiple feature reviews and consolidated into one AGENTS.md guidance recommendation
already-applied: implemented directly in this scrutiny run under appliedUpdates
